xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: Includes e.g. disinfectant products, pest control products. Note that the category refers to types of products, not to the technical function of the substance. PC 35 should be assigned to disinfectants being used as a component in a cleaning product.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Coatings and paints, thinners, paint removers
xone_alternatives.has_value: Coatings and paints, thinners, paint removers

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: This covers substances permanently binding with the metal surface. It includes e.g. galvanic and electroplating products.

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: It includes e.g. example treatment of walls before painting.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Processing aids such as pH-regulators, flocculants, precipitants, neutralization agents
xone_alternatives.has_value: Processing aids such as pH-regulators, flocculants, precipitants, neutralization agents

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: This category covers processing aids used in the chemical industry.

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: This category includes dyes, finishing, impregnation and care products.

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: This category includes e.g. bleaches, dye, finishing, impregnation products and other processing aids.

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: This category includes e.g. bleaches and other processing aids.

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: This category includes water and solvent based products.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Welding and soldering products, flux products
xone_alternatives.has_value: Welding and soldering products, flux products

xone_alternatives.label: Explanation and examples
xone_alternatives.has_value: This category includes products covered by the Cosmetics Regulation (EU Regulation 1223/2009) and other personal care products. It includes products such as. toothpaste, deodorants, etc.

xone_alternatives.label: Name
xone_alternatives.description: Oil and gas exploration or production products

xone_alternatives.has_value: Mixtures (liquids or pastes) designed to serve as electrolytes in batteries.
